description: Unit tests for the 'Tab' component, testing its constructor, show/hide behavior, event handling, disposal, and integration with jQuery in a testing environment.

classes.name: Tab
classes.description: The tab component class being tested, imported from '../../src/tab.js'.

methods.name: show
methods.description: Activates the tab and triggers related events.

methods.name: dispose
methods.description: Disposes the tab instance, cleaning up associated data.

methods.name: getInstance
methods.description: Retrieves the existing Tab instance associated with a DOM element.

methods.name: getOrCreateInstance
methods.description: Retrieves or creates a new Tab instance for a DOM element.

methods.name: jQueryInterface
methods.description: Method to integrate with jQuery, enabling initialization and method calls.
